title: podman installation on centos8 arm64
body:
wonder if you have any podman bin package provided to run on centos8 arm64 directly ? 
I try to compiled it on my centos8 arm64 with the podman source package, but it does't make any progress in two days( lots of dependency/problem to troubleshoot )

Thanks!

comments.body: we do not offer such a thing upstream.

> we do not offer such a thing upstream.

thanks for thr reply. could you provide any info about installation on arm? Appreciate for any info!
This is a discussion not an issue.
